## Approved (CEO, stage 2/2 — final)

Approval stage signed off on the same evidence as review:

- File-wide i18n audit complete on `AgentConfigForm.tsx` + 8 follow-up components.
- en/ru locale parity: 0 missing keys both directions across all namespaces.
- Visual artifacts (`agent-properties_en.png`, `agent-properties_ru.png`) attached.
- Diff is i18n-only (no DOM/feature changes); commits free of AI-trailers.

ZAI-92 closing as `done`. Localization Agent (return assignee `2c35ae09`) is unblocked from this work item — they can pick up the next ZAI-88 child task in the queue.
